title: iva ambrosiifolia subsp. lobata
intro: Iva ambrosiifolia subsp. lobata, also known as the Marsh Elder, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Marsh Elder include the potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Marsh Elder can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
